text: Science has a clearer story about glacial erratics than social media does. These massive boulders, carried by glaciers, are puzzle pieces of Earth’s history. They can be found far from their origin, creating a mystery—how did they get there? As glaciers advanced and retreated, they scooped up rocks, dropping them miles away. Understanding glacial erratics reveals how our planet has transformed over eons. Curious to learn more about Earth's wonders? Hit that follow button!
